sections.heading: Relative Velocity
sections.content: It is the vector difference between actual velocity of two bodies.
formulas: tan α = (V_B sin θ) / (V_A - V_B cos θ) [If V_AB makes an angle 'α' with V_A]
tan β = (V_A sin θ) / (V_B - V_A cos θ) [from -V_B]
specialCases: When two bodies are moving in same direction: |V_AB| = |V_A - V_B| (θ = 0°)
When two bodies moves perpendicularly: |V_AB| = √(V_A² + V_B²) (θ = 90°)
When two bodies are moving in opposite direction: |V_AB| = (V_A + V_B) (θ = 180°)

definitions.V_mw: Velocity of man in still water (capacity) = V
definitions.V_w: Velocity of water flow in the river = u
definitions.α: Direction of head of man with the direction of flow (angle with downstream)
definitions.S: Down stream drift (distance along the direction of flow by which swimmer shifts from original point)

shortestTime.condition: α = 90° (swimmer should start swimming perpendicular to the direction of flow)

shortestPath.condition: sin θ = u / V (required condition for swimmer to reach direct opposite point on the another bank of river)

formulas.relationWithStillWater: If t₁ and t₂ are the time taken by swimmer to travel same distance in upstream and down stream respectively then time taken by him to travel same distance in still water is given by: t = (2 t₁ t₂) / (t₁ + t₂)

sections.heading: Motion of Rain Drops and Motion of Winds

definitions.V_r: Actual velocity of Raindrops (observed by man when stationary)
definitions.V_m: Velocity of man relative to ground
definitions.V_rm: Velocity of raindrops observed by man when he is moving
definitions.V_wm: Velocity of wind observed by man when he is moving

specialCases.stationaryManRainVertical: When a man is stationary rain strikes him vertically. Now he starts moving then |V_rm| = √(V_r² + V_m²) and tan α = (V_m / V_r) from vertical.
specialCases.movingManRainAppearsVertical: When a man is moving, rain appears to strike him vertically. Then actual velocity of rain drops is |V_r| = √(V_rm² + V_m²) and tan α = (V_m / V_rm) from vertical.
specialCases.changeInManSpeed: When his velocity becomes V_m¹ (V_m¹ = nV_m) then rain appears to strike him at angle 'θ' with vertical. cot α = (n-1) cot θ and |V_r| = V_m / sin α.

definitions.V_pw: Velocity of plane relative to wind
definitions.V_p: Actual velocity of plane relative to ground

figures.description: Vector diagram for relative velocity V_AB = V_A - V_B showing parallelograms and vector subtractions.
